criteria.reason: Non-destructive migration apply path and UI/API contract are implemented and tested.
Runtime gates prefer product agents and old business fields are deprecated fallback/migration sources.
Legacy workflow is no longer prompt/state runtime truth.
Legacy product/admin UI entrypoints are removed from the cockpit path.
Agent cockpit, learning history, version actions, and approval explanations are implemented.
Architecture and OpenClaw contract docs are updated.
Focused compile, test, frontend build, and production deploy smoke checks pass.

commands_run: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m py_compile src/api/agent_blueprints_api.py src/services/agent_legacy_migration.py src/ai_agent_webhooks.py src/chats_api.py src/ai_agent.py
selective backend deploy + docker compose restart app worker + route/source smoke
bash scripts/deploy_frontend_dist.sh --build + live frontend chunk smoke
